horizon: Season of the Open Book, third leaf — the book is full, three newcomers are settling in, and every resident's day learns its own name
goals: Every day gets its name (Decree 9): thirty-three schedules all answer to 'unhurried day' — rename each top-level label from its owner's own story, a handful of residents per PR, every label something a watcher could read over their head and know whose day it is. The Unhurried Girl keeps hers; she earned it

The lane owes the miller a telling (Decree 4): his arrival earned a Chronicle line (PR #191) and no rumor carries it yet — let the lane be caught arguing whose debt it actually is, at its usual lateness, before the debt of remembering compounds

The well's book gets its spine: #172 stands ruled buildable and PR #175 waits at the founder's gate — when ratified, land the wish-ledger schema with fixtures and round-trip tests, then backfill both pages: the bridge wish, paid in full, and the nameless second wish (#180), owed and unnamed, exactly as Winsome entered it

The chance node (#182, ruled buildable): if the founder ratifies, land it schema-first — seeded child, optional otherwise, randomness explicit from the sim PRNG — then let a few of the most clockwork schedules breathe; feedback #178 closes when it lands
The book stays full: the region-lore gate (PR #185) should land so no seventeenth corner can ever ship silent — Decree 8 is paid; the gate is what keeps it paid
